info.title: Football Data API
info.description: The Football Data API provides comprehensive access to football (soccer) statistics and information. It includes data on areas, competitions, teams, matches, standings, scorers, and players. Perfect for building sports apps or platforms.

get.description: Returns a list of all available areas including countries and regions.

200.description: Successful response with list of areas

get.description: Returns detailed information about a specific area by ID, including child areas.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the area to retrieve

get.description: Returns a list of all available football competitions.

200.description: Successful response with list of competitions

get.description: Returns detailed information about a specific competition.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID or code of the competition

get.description: Returns all teams participating in a specific competition.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID or code of the competition

get.description: Returns the current standings/table for a competition.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID or code of the competition

get.description: Returns all matches for a specific competition.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID or code of the competition

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by match status (SCHEDULED, LIVE, IN_PLAY, PAUSED, FINISHED, POSTPONED, SUSPENDED, CANCELLED)

get.summary: Get top scorers in a competition
get.description: Returns the top scorers for a specific competition.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID or code of the competition

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Limit the number of scorers returned

get.description: Returns a list of all available teams.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Limit the number of teams returned

200.description: Successful response with list of teams

get.description: Returns detailed information about a specific team.
Returns all matches for a specific team.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Limit the number of matches returned

get.description: Returns a list of matches across all competitions.
Returns detailed information about a specific match.
Returns detailed information about a specific player or person.
Returns all matches for a specific person/player.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Limit the number of matches returned

ApiKeyAuth.name: X-Auth-Token
ApiKeyAuth.description: API key for authentication. Obtain from https://www.football-data.org

flag.description: URL to the area's flag image

crest.description: URL to the team's crest image

runningCompetitions.description: Competitions the team is currently participating in

utcDate.description: Match date and time in UTC

tags.name: Areas
tags.description: Operations related to geographical areas and countries

tags.name: Competitions
tags.description: Operations related to football competitions and leagues

tags.name: Teams
tags.description: Operations related to football teams and clubs

tags.name: Matches
tags.description: Operations related to football matches and fixtures

tags.name: Standings
tags.description: Operations related to competition standings and tables

tags.name: Scorers
